830000.name: Boosting Gatling
descriptionLines: A special Gatling Gun prepared for your rapid growth.
Aumenta o dano físico à distância em 1%.
Aumenta o dano físico à distância em additional 10%.
Quando combinado com ^990099Attack Booster Plate^000000, ^990099Attack Booster Manteau^000000, ^990099Attack Booster Greaves^000000 e ^990099Attack Booster Ring^000000:
Aumenta o dano físico contra all sized enemies em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Round Trip^000000 em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Round Trip^000000 em additional 20% for 60 segundos.
Quando combinado com ^990099Ranged Booster Suit^000000, ^990099Ranged Booster Manteau^000000, ^990099Ranged Booster Boots^000000 e ^990099Ranged Booster Brooch^000000:
Diminui ^009900Fire Rain^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Fire Rain^000000 em 2%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Fire Rain^000000 em additional 35% for 60 segundos.

830001.name: Lust Crusher
descriptionLines: A gatling gun used em mercenaries who guarded the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Fire Rain^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Fire Rain^000000 em additional 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Round Trip^000000 em 10%.
Diminui ^009900Fire Rain^000000 skill cooldown em 2 segundos.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Fire Rain^000000 em additional 25%.
When ^009900Fire Rain^000000 has been used, Aumenta o dano de ^009900Round Trip^000000 em additional 15% for 10 segundos.

830002.name: Patent The Black
descriptionLines: A black gatling gun used by those who have reached the level of Gunmaster who can handle all firearms skillfully.
Through the strength and grip of the barrel, it began to show its natural strength.
It seems to resonate with the Great Hero's Boots.
Aumenta ranged physical o dano by 4%.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Round Trip^000000 by 20%.
Aumenta o consumo de SP of ^009900Round Trip^000000 by 10%.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Round Trip^000000 by additional 15%.
Aumenta ATQ by 50 and ranged physical o dano by 10% for 90 segundos.
Aumenta physical o dano against all sized enemies by 15%.
Aumenta ranged physical o dano by 5%.

830003.name: Adulter Fides Gatling Gun
descriptionLines: A gatling gun filled with false beliefs.
Increases o dano of ^009900Round Trip^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Round Trip^000000 by additional 20%.
Increases physical o dano against all sized enemies by 15%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Round Trip^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ranged physical o dano by 15%.
